title: Little Bo Peep
overview: While working as security for a merchant, exterminator Kidow intervenes when insects attack, then promises to convey young Ilie to her mother.

title: Anchovy and Black Lizard
overview: As gruesome murders come to light, Kidow suspects they're not the work of insects. When Ilie goes to the market, someone steals her bag.

title: From the Abyss
overview: Ilie befriends the leader of the Red Rats. At Mario Garden, Kidow receives a letter and a map marked with the locations of the murders.

title: As a Heartless Sword
overview: The army prepares to exterminate an insect lurking in the sand beneath E-05. Still regretting his actions five years ago, Qasim volunteers as bait.

title: From the Far East
overview: Ilie learns from Mario how Kidow's adoptive father, Lazarus, taught him the harsh lessons of survival in the Cagaster-infested Far East.

title: Awakening
overview: A man claiming to be Ilie's father arrives to take her away. She and Kidow try to flee, but are ambushed by Acht before they can make their escape.

title: Iliaster
overview: Searching for clues to Ilie's past, Jin and Kidow discover a message that Griffith recorded for Franz, explaining his actions and Ilie's origins.

title: Princess in the Insect Cage
overview: Adham's forces plot to overthrow the Bazaar Overseer and turn E-05 into an insect cage. Kidow escapes to E-07, where Ilie is now held prisoner.

title: Insects' Feast
overview: Kidow infiltrates E-07's main tower in search of Ilie. After learning the truth of her origins, Ilie proclaims herself the next queen of the cage.

title: Up
overview: Reunited, Ilie and Kidow make their way up to the throne room, but Adham's security detail and numerous Cagasters stand in their way.

title: To You…
overview: Gravely injured, Franz guides Ilie to the queen's chamber and gives her control over Tania's fate. Acht and Kidow face off for the final time.

title: Finally, For You
overview: As the battle between Salif’s forces and the defenders of E-05 come to an end, the survivors inside E-07's main tower confront their futures.
